response.justification: Candidate vastly exceeds the seniority bar — this is a Junior/Mid role and the applicant is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience. Technical fit is excellent (TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST, SQL/relational DB familiarity, Kubernetes, AWS, plus AI/LLM tooling experience). Main concerns are overqualification leading to retention/compensation mismatch, no explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js mentions, and the role requires high on-site presence in an unspecified location while the candidate is Berlin-based.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React fullstack experience across many production systems
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, workshops/teaching)
Bonus alignment: AI agent/MCP tooling, Kubernetes, AWS, Docker experience matches nice-to-haves
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level IC role — likely salary and growth-path mismatch
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed (MongoDB and other Node frameworks instead)
On-site requirement may conflict with location/seniority expectations of a Staff engineer
